summary: Published the crm-cleanup runx skill to GitHub and the hosted runx registry, opened PR #248 against runxhq/runx, and ran a dogfood test from the hosted registry that sealed successfully with a verified receipt. The skill reads an interaction transcript and CRM schema, extracts grounded takeaways, maps them to allowed CRM fields, and emits a gated write_proposal with no live CRM write. Harness passes 3/3 on the hosted registry.
observations: runx --version output: runx-cli 0.6.16 (satisfies 0.6.14 floor)
Publisher owner: armstrongsam25; package name: crm-cleanup; version: sha-3ce7ea783bf5; registry ref: armstrongsam25/crm-cleanup@sha-3ce7ea783bf5
public_url: https://runx.ai/x/armstrongsam25/crm-cleanup@sha-3ce7ea783bf5 (live, HTTP 200)
pr_url: https://github.com/runxhq/runx/pull/248 (open, contains skills/crm-cleanup/X.yaml, SKILL.md, run.mjs, evidence)

Publish method: runx login --provider github --for publish, then runx registry publish ./skills/crm-cleanup/SKILL.md --registry https://api.runx.ai
Install command: runx add armstrongsam25/crm-cleanup@sha-3ce7ea783bf5
Hosted harness status: passed 3/3 cases (sealed_transcript_yields_updates, sealed_noop_empty_field_updates, stop_missing_transcript) with 3 receipts
Harness case names: sealed_transcript_yields_updates (sealed, process_closed), sealed_noop_empty_field_updates (sealed, process_closed), stop_missing_transcript (failure, process_failed)

Harness receipt ids: sha256:0b2cd9b1a54a6e9e162f0ae112a9569653cff0695a89bd3f188cd147b1246ecc, sha256:5e5a8a16053b9a119859037d9dc18a8988e14b4a934c38f150cfcb35d0d857db, sha256:4521b8fb5d8b4ee3d8c45222f48d01c68bd8b1d71c0f011f459ac78b6648b120

Dogfood command: runx skill armstrongsam25/crm-cleanup@sha-3ce7ea783bf5 --registry https://api.runx.ai --input transcript='Call with Sarah Chen from Acme Corp...' --input-json crm_schema='{"fields":[...]}' --json
Dogfood receipt_ref: sha256:f365bdf83c3940321a7ae9292754dccd7431b870532e35104f1dfb91ed33d711
runx verify verdict: valid=true, digest=valid, content_address=valid, signature=valid (production mode, kid=runx-demo-key)
Dogfood takeaways: 4 takeaways extracted (tk1: company=Acme Corp, tk2: deal_value=50000, tk3: stage=qualified, tk4: expected_close_date=July), each grounded with source_quote from transcript
Dogfood field_updates: 4 field_updates mapped to crm_schema fields (company, deal_value, stage, expected_close_date), each traces to a takeaway_id and targets only allowed fields
Dogfood write_proposal: gate=proposed, performed_write=false, note='Gated proposal — no live CRM write performed. Review before applying.' — skill performs no live connector write
No-op path: sealed_noop_empty_field_updates case yields empty field_updates when transcript has no actionable CRM information (general support call about business hours)

New user walkthrough: runx add armstrongsam25/crm-cleanup@sha-3ce7ea783bf5, then runx skill armstrongsam25/crm-cleanup@sha-3ce7ea783bf5 --input transcript='...' --input-json crm_schema='...' --json, verify with runx verify --receipt <receipt.json> --json

dogfood.input: Call transcript with Sarah Chen from Acme Corp mentioning VP of Engineering role, enterprise plan interest, $50k Q3 budget, and expected signing by end of July. CRM schema with title, company, deal_value, stage, expected_close_date fields.
dogfood.command: runx skill armstrongsam25/crm-cleanup@sha-3ce7ea783bf5 --registry https://api.runx.ai --input transcript='Call with Sarah Chen from Acme Corp on 2026-07-01. Sarah said she is the VP of Engineering at Acme. She asked about the enterprise plan and mentioned a budget of 50000 for Q3. She wants to move forward and expects to sign by end of July.' --input-json crm_schema='{"fields":[{"name":"title","type":"string"},{"name":"company","type":"string"},{"name":"deal_value","type":"number"},{"name":"stage","type":"enum","options":["lead","qualified","closed"]},{"name":"expected_close_date","type":"date"}]}' --json
dogfood.verify_verdict: valid=true, digest=valid, content_address=valid, signature=valid (production mode, kid=runx-demo-key)
